analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場主軸圍繞著人工智慧、股市波動和全球經濟情勢。谷歌和蘋果的AI投資選擇成為焦點，分析師們爭論哪一家公司更有前景。另一方面，美國股市大幅下跌受中國DeepSeek的影響，倫敦金市金價跌幅達1.4%。伊朗封鎖霍爾木茲海峽後，中東海上緊張局勢升級，可能導致全球石油供應受影響。美國新增441萬富翁，平均每天新增1,200名富翁，較2024年增加1.9%。

【結語】
今天的市場情緒顯示投資者需要保持謹慎。人工智慧的波動和全球經濟情勢的不確定性使得投資者需要更加謹慎地評估風險。投資者們應該保持耐心，避免在市場波動中做出倉促的決定。同時，投資者們也應該關注自己的財務狀況，確保自己的投資組合符合自己的風險承受能力和投資目標。

【精選個股】
PKX - POSCO Holdings Inc. - 公司正在進行分析師/投資者大會，可能釋出公司未來發展策略和財務預測。
VRTX - Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated - 公司正在進行重要交易，包括生物科技領域的投資。
MGM - MGM Resorts International - 公司正在進行重要交易，包括娛樂業的投資。
風險提醒：投資者們應該注意公司的財務狀況和未來發展策略，避免在市場波動中做出倉促的決定。

items.title: AbbVie Is Already a Dividend King. Here's Why the $10.9 Billion Apogee Deal Could Make It a Dynasty
items.summary: AbbVie inherited its status as a Dividend King, but it is building a strong foundation to continue the dividend streak.
items.zh_title: 阿布維（AbbVie）已經成為股息王，但10.9億美元Apogee交易可能讓它成為股息王朝
items.zh_point: 阿布維繼承了股息王的頭銜，但正在建立強大的基礎來延續股息領袖地位。

items.title: Google vs Apple: Which of the 2 Biggest AI Stocks Is the Better Buy Right Now?
items.summary: Alphabet and Apple both carry trillion-dollar AI ambitions, but their valuations, growth rates, and capital strategies tell very different stories for retirement investors who need the right answer before they buy.
items.zh_title: 谷歌與蘋果：哪一個是目前最好的AI投資選擇？
items.zh_point: 谷歌和蘋果都有超過一兆美元的AI願景，但其評估、成長率和資本策略卻有著不同的故事，對於退休投資者而言，需要在購買前找到正確的答案。

items.title: Warren Buffett Swears By This 1 Low-Cost Investment. History Proves He's Been Right Every Time.
items.summary: There's a good reason why Buffett says this investment is "the best thing" for most people.
items.zh_title: 伯克希爾的巴菲特堅信這1種低成本投資，歷史證明他每次都對了
items.zh_point: 巴菲特堅信低成本投資是大多數人最佳選擇，歷史證據表明他一直都是對的。

items.title: The U.S. Added 441K New Millionaires Last Year. That's More Than 1,200 Every Day. It Now Accounts for Over 40% of the World's Millionaires
items.summary: The U.S. added 441,078 new millionaires last year, according to the UBS Global Wealth Report 2026. That works out to more than 1,200 new millionaires every day and is an increase of 1.9% from 2024. The report also found that...
items.zh_title: 美國新增441萬富翁，超過全球40%
items.zh_point: 根據UBS全球財富報告2026，美國新增441,078名富翁，平均每天新增1,200名富翁，較2024年增加1.9%。

items.title: The Vanguard ETF Warren Buffett Endorsed in 2014 Would Have Turned $5,000 Into $20,465 Today
items.summary: The Oracle of Omaha understands that too many investors easily fall into the trap of trying to outperform the market, ultimately undermining their own performance.
items.zh_title: 沃倫巴菲特在2014年推薦的Vanguard ETF，投資5,000美元將可達到20,465美元
items.zh_point: 沃倫巴菲特認為許多投資人容易陷入試圖超越市場的陷阱，最終會損害自己的投資績效。

items.title: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier
items.summary: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.
items.zh_title: 川普威脅若伊朗試圖暗殺他將會徹底毀滅伊朗
items.zh_point: 川普表示，若伊朗試圖暗殺他，將會釋放1,000枚導彈，對伊朗進行攻擊。

items.title: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One story, newspaper says
items.summary: The Trump administration issued subpoenas to several journalists after its report on security concerns involving the new Air Force One, according to the paper.
items.zh_title: 特朗普政府傳召《紐約時報》記者調查空中一號機新聞
items.zh_point: 特朗普政府向《紐約時報》多名記者傳召調查其報導空中一號機安全問題的新聞。

items.title: Typhoon Bavi makes landfall in eastern China's Taizhou after nearly 2 million evacuated
items.summary: Typhoon Bavi made landfall late on Saturday in the coastal city of Taizhou in eastern China, where nearly 2 million people were evacuated,
items.zh_title: 颱風巴維登陸中國東部的泰州，近200萬人撤離
items.zh_point: 颱風巴維於週六晚間在中國東部的泰州沿海城市登陸，近200萬人被疏散。

items.title: The volatile AI trade marched higher, but oil kept Wall Street on edge last week
items.summary: Chip stocks had a wild but strong week. Meta led our portfolio higher.
items.zh_title: AI 股市波動持續上揚，但石油價格仍使紐約證券交易所緊張
items.zh_point: 晶片股市過去一週呈現出強勁的波動，Meta 的表現最為突出。

items.title: These underperforming trades could yield big returns over next six months
items.summary: ETF Action's Mike Akins is encouraging investors to boost exposure to groups that underperformed compared with major artificial intelligence stocks.
items.zh_title: 這些表現不佳的交易可能在未來六個月內帶來大幅收益
items.zh_point: ETF Action的Mike Akins建議投資者增加對表現不佳的AI相關股票群組的投資比例，以盡量捕捉未來市場的上漲機會。

items.title: My insurance company said my roof lost a few tiles. Loss adjusters found $10,000 in storm damage. How could this happen?
items.summary: “My house shook violently from the wind.”
items.zh_title: 我的保險公司說屋頂掉了幾片瓦，調查員發現風災損失達10,000美元，到底發生了什麼事？
items.zh_point: 一位房主描述屋子在風暴中搖晃不已，卻被保險公司認為屋頂損壞不大，直到調查員發現風災造成的損失達10,000美元，房主感到困惑不已。

items.title: ‘I get $1,460 in Social Security’: My millionaire ex-husband, 74, refuses to pay alimony. What can I do?
items.summary: “I have very little money, while my ex’s financial statements show assets in the millions.”
items.zh_title: 我丈夫年薪百萬，74歲仍拒繳撫養費，該怎麼辦？
items.zh_point: 一名年輕女性因丈夫拒繳撫養費而感到困擾，丈夫的財務報表顯示他擁有數百萬的資產，該女性尋求法律幫助以確保自己能夠獲得適當的撫養費。

items.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
items.summary: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”
items.zh_title: 為什麼要等到70歲才領取社會保障？我的兄弟如此痛苦地學習了教訓
items.zh_point: 一名男子在70歲領取社會保障後，卻因為癌症在領取第一筆金額後不久便去世。這個故事讓他對政府鼓勵延遲領取社會保障的建議產生了質疑。

items.title: Is it better to spend my savings now so I can delay taking Social Security? How do I choose?
items.summary: “By claiming earlier, I could preserve more of my portfolio and allow those assets to continue compounding.”
items.zh_title: 是否應該現在花費儲蓄以延遲領取社會保障？
items.zh_point: 社會保障的領取時間對個人財務有重大影響，需要考慮儲蓄的保留和投資收益。

items.title: Your data built the AI boom — but Big Tech is pocketing 100% of the equity
items.summary: Your share of the AI wealth is a right — not a handout. Here is how we claw back our money.
items.zh_title: 你的數據造就了人工智慧的繁榮 — 但大科技公司卻囊括了100%的股權
items.zh_point: 你對人工智慧的財富份額是一種權利，而不是施捨。以下是如何爭取回你的錢。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌受中國DeepSeek影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大多下跌，納斯達克指數領先跌幅，人工智慧基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，多家公司股價跌幅超過10%，Nvidia股價跌幅達16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 倫敦金市金、白銀結束下跌
items.zh_point: 倫敦金市金價跌幅達1.4%，連續兩天下跌，白銀跌幅達2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，無需使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度探索不會讓美國AI巨頭沉沒
items.zh_point: Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌引起的恐慌過度了。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊產業回顧：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi等公司在最新的市場話題中被提及，涉及科技、媒體和通訊產業的發展。

items.title: POSCO Holdings Inc. (PKX) Analyst/Investor Day - Slideshow
items.zh_title: POSCO Holdings Inc. (PKX) 分析師/投資者大會 - 幕後花絮
items.zh_point: POSCO Holdings Inc. (PKX) 進行分析師/投資者大會，可能釋出公司未來發展策略和財務預測。

items.title: Vistance Networks: A Leaner Company, But A Wait-And-See Rating (Rating Downgrade)
items.zh_title: Vistance Networks：一家更精簡的公司，但仍需觀望評級（評級下調）
items.zh_point: Vistance Networks 因為精簡公司而獲得改善，但投資人仍需要觀望該公司未來發展的表現。評級下調的原因是該公司未能證明其經營效率的可持續性。

items.title: Key deals this week: MGM, PERF, VRTX, and more
items.zh_title: 本周關鍵交易：MGM、PERF、VRTX等
items.zh_point: 本周有多家公司進行了重要交易，包括娛樂公司MGM、生物科技公司PERF和VRTX等。

items.title: Lightwave Logic: The Marvell-Polariton Setup Is The Real Story
items.zh_title: 光波邏輯：馬威爾-極光子設置才是真相
items.zh_point: 光波邏輯公司的股價近期大幅上漲，市場人士認為這與馬威爾公司的極光子設置有關，極光子設置是一種新型光纖技術，可能會大幅提升光纖的傳輸速度。

items.title: Bulls vs. Bears: SK Hynix jolts analysts amid record-setting IPO
items.zh_title: 牛市與熊市：SK Hynix驚動分析師　創下史上最大規模IPO
items.zh_point: SK Hynix在全球最大規模的首次公開募股(IPO)中引起了市場的關注，分析師對公司未來的發展表現出不同的看法。

items.title: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz after vessel incident, escalating Gulf tensions
items.zh_title: 伊朗封鎖霍爾木茲海峽 後海上緊張升級
items.zh_point: 伊朗封鎖霍爾木茲海峽後，中東海上緊張局勢升級，可能導致全球石油供應受影響。

items.title: Soccer-World Cup reflects growing US appetite for soccer, ’Ted Lasso’ creators say
items.zh_title: 世界盃足球賽反映出美國對足球的日益增長的興趣，「Ted Lasso」創作者表示
items.zh_point: 《Ted Lasso》劇組表示，世界盃足球賽的熱潮證實了美國對足球的日益增長的興趣，表明足球在美國的受歡迎程度正在上升。

items.title: UK police arrest man on suspicion of killing former minister Widdecombe
items.zh_title: 英國警方拘捕一名懷疑謀殺前內閣部長維德考姆的男子
items.zh_point: 英國警方對一名男子進行拘捕，懷疑他涉及謀殺前內閣部長維德考姆的案件。

items.title: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times reporters over Air Force One leak
items.zh_title: 特朗普政府傳喚紐約時報記者調查空軍一號機密泄露案
items.zh_point: 特朗普政府傳發傳票給紐約時報兩名記者，調查空軍一號機密情報泄露事件，引發媒體自由和政府監管爭議。

items.title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz closed as ’unauthorised’ vessel hit
items.zh_title: 伊朗宣布霍爾木茲海峽關閉
items.zh_point: 伊朗宣布霍爾木茲海峽關閉，指責一艘未經許可的船隻遭到攻擊，引發全球油價上漲的擔憂。
